parameters.query:
SELECT d.dialog_id, d.status, d.employee_id, ar.result AS analysis,
       e.telegram_chat_id, e.full_name
FROM dialogs d
JOIN analysis_results ar ON ar.dialog_id = d.dialog_id
JOIN employees e ON e.employee_id = d.employee_id
WHERE d.dialog_id = '{{ $json.body.dialog_id }}'::uuid
  AND d.employee_id = '{{ $json.body.employee_id }}'
  AND d.status = 'training_approved';

INSERT INTO training_sessions (session_id, dialog_id, employee_id, state, context)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.session_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.dialog_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.employee_id }}',
  'intro',
  '[]'::jsonb
)
RETURNING session_id, dialog_id, state;

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $('Parse Message').first().json.chat_id, text: 'Сначала нажмите «Подтвердить тренировку» в сообщении выше.' }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  ts.session_id,
  ts.dialog_id,
  ts.employee_id,
  ts.state AS session_state,
  ts.context,
  e.telegram_chat_id,
  e.full_name,
  ar.result AS analysis
FROM training_sessions ts
JOIN employees e ON e.employee_id = ts.employee_id
JOIN analysis_results ar ON ar.dialog_id = ts.dialog_id
WHERE e.telegram_chat_id = '{{ $json.chat_id }}'
  AND ts.ended_at IS NULL
  AND ts.state != 'done'
ORDER BY ts.started_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.action_token, p.dialog_id, d.employee_id, d.status
FROM pending_training_actions p
JOIN dialogs d ON d.dialog_id = p.dialog_id
WHERE p.action_token = '{{ $json.action_token }}'::uuid
  AND p.used_at IS NULL
  AND p.expires_at > NOW()
  AND d.status = 'awaiting_training_confirm';
